vocab.meaning: người năng nổ, thích giao du và kết bạn
vocab.example: I was quite a social butterfly as a kid, always organizing group games like tag or hide-and-seek in the neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: cố gắng hết sức (thường là để đạt được điều gì đó mình thích)
vocab.example: I would bend over backwards to finish my chores quickly just so I could spend the rest of the day flying kites.

vocab.meaning: có tài năng thiên bẩm về cái gì
vocab.example: Ever since I was little, I had a flair for storytelling, often making up elaborate fairy tales to entertain my younger cousins.

vocab.meaning: như cá gặp nước (được làm điều mình giỏi và thích nhất)
vocab.example: I was truly in my element whenever I was near water, spending entire summer afternoons swimming at the local creek.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực vượt mức bình thường
vocab.example: I would always go the extra mile to decorate my scrapbooks, using every glitter pen and sticker I could find.

vocab.word: have a memory like a sieve
vocab.meaning: não cá vàng (hay quên - dùng để kể về việc quên giờ giấc khi chơi)
vocab.example: I had a memory like a sieve when it came to my curfew because I was always too busy playing football with friends.

vocab.meaning: trở thành bản năng/kỹ năng thuần thục
vocab.example: Climbing trees was second nature to me; I spent so much time up there that I knew every branch of the old oak in our yard.

vocab.meaning: ở những nơi hẻo lánh, ít người qua lại
vocab.example: My friends and I loved exploring areas off the beaten track, looking for 'secret' spots in the woods behind our school.

vocab.meaning: người được ai đó yêu thương nhất (kể về việc được ông bà chiều chuộng cho chơi)
vocab.example: Being the apple of my grandmother's eye, I was often allowed to stay up late to help her with her knitting.

vocab.meaning: giỏi hơn hẳn những người khác
vocab.example: When it came to board games, my brother was head and shoulders above the rest of us, but we still loved the challenge.
